title: Street Fighter 6/Version/2.02 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 2.02 Game Version 2.02 date March 17, 2026 Summary Alex Release. Balance changes for all characters. Links Patch Notes Alex Patch Alex released Universal Changes Drive Rush Overheads: now universally +1 on Block (-3 normally) with enough block pushback to prevent an immediate Throw or low-hitting light chain (e.g. 2LK~2LP) Only applies to standard overhead command normals that can lead to grounded combos on hit Frame Data changes affect A.K.I., Akuma, Chun-Li, Elena, Ryu, Sagat, Terry Pushback changes affect Blanka, C. Viper, E. Honda, Guile, Jamie, JP, Juri, Kimberly, Lily, Luke, M. Bison, Mai, Marisa, Rashid, Sagat, Terry Drive Rush Screen Freeze: pressing an Up input during the freeze will now buffer a jump after the screen freeze ends Still subject to move priority, like special moves canceling the prejump frames Neutral jumps during the freeze will become forward/back jumps if the left/right direction is held after the Up direction Only applies if the character is in neutral during the screen freeze (will not be buffered on wakeup or during a move's recovery) Wakeup Input Buffer: extended by 3 frames (7f → 10f) Character Changes A.K.I. Toxic Blossom builds an additional 2000 Drive meter every time it triggers (unless Drive Rush is used during the combo) 236LP / 236MP / 2PP~P: 2000 → 4000 236HP: 2500 → 4500 5HP~HP / 214LP~6P: 3000 → 5000 236PP / 214PP~6P: 0 → 2000 5LP is now chainable into or out of 2LP/2LK Pu Lao (3MP) blockstun 19 → 18; Block Advantage -2 → -3 Hun Dun (5LP~LP) hitstun increased 17 → 18, blockstun increased 15 → 16, recovery increased 14 → 15 (hit/whiff) and 16 → 17 (block); Drive Rush cancel occurs 1f later No change to Hit/Block advantage or DRC advantage; indirectly decreases Perfect Parry advantage -16 → -17 and Sinister Slide cancel advantage +5/+3 → +6/+4 These changes allow 214LP to combo from the Target Combo except near max range OD Nightshade Pulse (214PP) 2nd hit Juggle Increase value decreased 3 → 2 (more lenient after juggling on airborne opponents) Akuma 5MP whiff recovery increased 11 → 13; extended hurtbox lasts until end of recovery 2MK hitstun reduced 23 → 22; Hit Advantage +1 → 0; DRC Hit Advantage +11 → +10 Can no longer combo naturally into OD Adamant Flame (214PP) 2HP hitstun increased 27 → 28 on the first 3 active frames; Hit Advantage 0 → +1; DRC Hit Advantage +17 → +18 Skull Splitter (6MP) 2nd hit blockstun 20 → 18; Block Advantage -1 → -3 MK Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku (214MK) 2nd hit active frames increased 2 → 3 (and removed 1 airborne recovery frame to compensate) More consistent in juggles where opponent is launched higher up OD Adamant Flame (214PP) startup when canceled from 2MK increased 18 → 20 to prevent it from comboing Lv.3 Gou Hadoken (236[P]/[PP]) hits increased 3 → 4; damage increased 1200 (300x2,600) → 1350 (250x3,600); total chip damage 300 → 336 Recovery reduced 28 → 21 (hit/block) / 26 (whiff); total frames are 77(82) meterless / 52(57) OD; "whiff" means the projectile does not make contact within the first 21 active frames Hit Advantage KD +57 → KD +69; Block Advantage +5 → +20; Perfect Parry Advantage +4 → +22; total blockstun 34 → 42 Drive Damage increased 3000 → 4000 (Block) / 7000 → 9000 (Punish Counter); Drive Gain (meterless version) increased 1000 → 4000; Super Gain 600 → 800 Blanka 5MK hitstun 24 → 25; Hit Advantage +4 → +5; DRC Hit Advantage +14 → +15 Can now combo into Wild Lift (2PP~P) on Counter-hit; reduced pushback so that OD Backstep Roll combos more consistently 2HP now knocks down on Counter-hit, +2 → (KD +40); can only juggle on airborne connect Rock Crusher (6MP) increased pushback on block Wild Nail (6HP) KD Advantage increased KD +23 → KD +30; now KD +2 after ending with Coward Crouch ~ Forward Hop Surprise Forward Hop throw invincibility on frames 12-22 removed SA2-Enhanced Rolling Attack ([4]6P) Drive damage on Block reduced; LP/MP 7500 → 4000, HP 10000 → 6000 Blanka-chan Bomb now disappears if Blanka is hit after activating them C. Viper 2MP active frames 3 → 4 (recovery 17 → 16 to compensate); reduced forward hurtbox on arms during active frames 5HP blockstun 21 → 22; Block Advantage -3 → -2; High Jump > 214HP Feint Block Advantage 0 → +1 5HK increased OTG bounce time and reduced horizontal knockback on airborne opponents Now juggles into corner OD Thunder Dash and is more consistent into OD Burning Kick / SA1 in some routes Viper Elbow (6MP) increased pushback on block HP Thunder Dash (214HP) expanded collision box upward to make it harder for opponents to pass behind C. Viper Aerial Burning Kick (j.236K) blockstun increased 21 → 22 (normal jump) / 20 → 21 (High Jump); landing recovery when cross-up is blocked increased 13 → 14 Min/Max Block Advantage increased by +1f when hitting same-side (highly variable); cross-up block advantages are unchanged As a result, High Jump > Air MK Burning Kick is now +1 on Block when used at the earliest timing (powerful approach tool) SA1 expanded hitbox upward on the 1st and 2nd hits Install Timer now causes Tracer Combination / Knuckled Pursuit / Double Burn to build 3000 Drive gauge on hit/block SA2 collision box expanded upward (less likely to whiff under opponent) Input shortcuts no longer apply when using HP button or after High Jump in order to avoid conflict with 214HP Feint execution Also shortened the input buffer window in these scenarios and prevents kara-canceling a normal/special into SA2 unless the full 214214P command is properly input Cammy Delayed Ripper (6HK) recovery on hit reduced 25 → 20; Juggle Start value reduced 3 → 1; increased juggle height on Punish Counter (KD +48 → +52) Allows new juggle routes, like 6HK > DRC~5HP~HK, or PC 6HK > 214LP, SA1 HK Cannon Spike (623HK) increased forward movement on startup (easier to connect the higher-damage early active frames in juggles) Cannon Strike (j.214K/KK) hitstun/blockstun increased by 2f when connecting on the final 2 active frames before landing (causing a screen shake and reduced pushback) Screen shake guarantees a minimum advantage of +10 oH / +4 oB (or +6 oB for OD) SA1 active frames on 1st hit increased 3 → 4 (no difference to total frame count) Chun-Li Water Lotus Fist (3HP) blockstun 16 → 15; Block Advantage -2 → -3 Stance Cancel on Block: -1 → -2 into follow-up, -9 -10 into block Snake Strike (Stance MP) startup reduced 7 → 6; active frames increased 11 → 12; added 1f extra knockdown time on hit (can now combo from 5HP) If the first active frame connects, this makes it 1f more unsafe on block (-15) while keeping the same knockdown advantage Modern Controls: can now hold Up or Down to remain in Serenity Stream stance after recovery Forward Strike (Stance LK) hitbox expanded forward 0.05 units; Range 1.469(1.443) → 1.519(1.493) Lightning Kick Barrage (236KK~KK) no longer has separate damage scaling applied after 236KK hits LK Hazanshu (214LK) damage reduced 1000 → 700 and chip damage 250 → 175; active frames increased 2 → 3; recovery reduced 21 → 20 (no change to total duration) Reduced horizontal range; removed lower body projectile invincibility on frames 7-18; Juggle Limit increased 1 → 5 (best juggle potential of all her meterless specials) Blockstun increased 14 → 18; Block Advantage -9 → -5; increased pushback on block (safe vs. Burnout and can be spaced safely depending on opponent's 5f punish range) Hit effect changed from 0 oH → KD +21 (grounded) and gives a very short ground bounce when juggled on airborne opponents Cancel into SA3 no longer combos due to the knockdown (even with juggled ground bounce); can still be useful for chip damage or for reacting to DI armor HK/OD Hazanshu (214HK/KK) chip damage corrected 250 → 300 Dee Jay 2LK projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox above Dee Jay's foot 2MP hitstun 22 → 23; Hit Advantage +4 → +5; DRC Hit Advantage +12 → +13 Now links to 5LK and combos when canceled into MP Machine Gun Uppercut (214MP); DR~2MP links to 5HP on crouching opponents Whiff recovery increased 14 → 15; extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery 2HP expanded the front hurtbox during recovery HP Machine Gun Uppercut (214HP) Super Gain on hit increased 2100 → 2500 and increased the input buffer at the end of recovery OD Machine Gun Uppercut (214PP) startup reduced 28 → 26; can now combo from 5HP or 4HK (1st hit) as well as PC/DR 2MP OD Waning Moon (214KK~MK) no longer hits standing opponents on the first active frame (gives consistent +6 advantage on tall characters) Juggling Sway (214K/KK~6P~4P) can now cancel the backdash into ~LK / ~MK / ~HK follow-ups for more mixup potential Reduced the forward hurtbox on frames 5-17 (normal) / 5-13 (OD); moves backward earlier on the OD version Dhalsim Fixed bug where Drive Parry would drain twice as fast after being held for 30 frames j.MP now puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state when juggled into (but not as an air-to-air) Reduced air knockback; Juggle Increase value 1 → 2 (only when juggled into) Now cancelable into Drill Kick (j.2K) / Yoga Mummy (j.2LP) on hit (can air-to-air more safely and extend juggle routes after OD Yoga Flame) Increased Juggle Limit 1 → 4 on j.HP / j.HK, 0 → 4 on Drill Kick (j.2K), and 1 → 3 on Yoga Mummy (j.2LP) to capitalize on these juggle conversions MP Yoga Flame (63214MP) expanded the forward hitbox; Drive Gain increased 2400 → 3000 HP Yoga Flame (63214HP) expanded the forward hitbox; Drive Gain increased 2700 → 4000 OD Yoga Flame (63214PP) recovery on hit reduced 24 → 19; reduced air knockdown time by 4f (results in KD Advantage +50 → +51) Allows Dhalsim to juggle into an immediate j.MP OD Yoga Comet (j.63214PP) Juggle Limit 2,2 → 3,4; Juggle Increase 1,1 → 0,1 (easier to juggle into and more lenient juggle state after comboing into it) Increased the input buffer window after landing Ed 2LK projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox near Ed's head 2MK whiff recovery increased 17 → 19; extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery Forward range reduced on the hitbox that connects on crouching opponents (no difference to max range vs. standing) 2HK hit/block recovery 17 → 19; whiff recovery 17 → 21; Hit Advantage reduced +1 → -1; Block Advantage reduced -4 → -6 Proximity guard box starts later, frame 6 → 9 Low Smash Combination (2HK~HP) can be canceled into Kill Rush (6KK/4KK) on hit only; KD Advantage increased +34 → +38 with higher launch OD Psycho Flicker (236KK) combo scaling 15% → 20% (e.g. counts as 2 hits of scaling for next attack) SA2 scaling on Super Gain 80% → 50% for all further hits of the combo E. Honda Power Stomp (3HK) increased pushback on block Sumo Spirit enhanced Hundred Hand Slap (214P) now performs the final hit on block for all versions, increasing Block Advantage by 4 frames and Drive Damage on block by 3000 Enhanced LP Hundred Hand Slap (214LP) Block Advantage increased -4 → 0; blockstun 30 → 42; Drive Damage on Block 3000 → 6000 MP Hundred Hand Slap (214MP, Normal/Enhanced) startup reduced 18 → 16 (combos from lights); expanded combo-only hitbox forward from 2nd hit onward for juggle consistency Normal version only: increased hit pushback for the final hit Enhanced version only: Block Advantage increased -8 → -4; blockstun 41 → 53; Drive Damage on Block 4000 → 7000 HP Hundred Hand Slap (214HP, Normal/Enhanced) startup reduced 21 → 19; expanded combo-only hitbox forward from 2nd hit onward for juggle consistency Enhanced version only: Block Advantage increased -8 → -4; blockstun 53 → 65; Drive Damage on Block 5000 → 8000 Enhanced OD Hundred Hand Slap (214PP) Block Advantage increased -3 → +1; blockstun 52 → 60; Drive Damage on Block 5000 → 8000 Elena Handstand Whip 1 (6MK) blockstun 20 → 19; Block Advantage -2 → -3 HK Rhino Horn (236HK) launches opponent higher; KD +39 → KD +40 Allows corner juggle into HK Scratch Wheel and better midscreen oki (KD +2 after HP Roll) SA1 launches opponent higher; KD +42 → KD +44; can now juggle OD Rhino Horn off a grounded hit SA2 (Healing) health recovery increased 1300 → 1600; now recovers 10000 Drive gauge (1 bar) Guile 2HP can now be canceled on the 1st active frame; Hitconfirm Window: 15f DRC Advantage +15 oH / +6 oB; SA2 Cancel Advantage +18 oH / +9 oB Full Bullet Magnum (6MP) increased pushback on block Spinning Back Knuckle (6HP) Super Gain increased 500 → 1200 Drake Fang (2MK~6MP) now maintains the Counter-hit/Punish Counter property of the initial 2MK (deals Drive damage for both Punish Counter hits) Counter-hit/Punish Counter now causes a limited juggle OTG bounce on hit (KD +47); Drive Damage on Punish Counter reduced 4000 → 2000 OD Sonic Blade (214PP) now has 3 versions depending on button strength that affect the projectile movement speed; added a proximity guard hitbox until end of active frames LP+MP Slow / LP+HP Medium / MP+HP Fast SA1 expanded projectile collision box upward to collide with Sagat's High Tiger Shot Jamie 2LK hitstun 14 → 16; Hit Advantage +1 → +3; now combos into 2MK out of Drive Rush 2MK hitbox expanded forward; Range 1.42 → 1.46 5HP 2nd hit reduced air knockback; 3rd hit increased air knockback time and expanded the combo-only hitbox upward (more consistent in certain juggle routes) Falling Star Kick (6MK) increased pushback on block Ransui Haze Headbutt (DL4 6HK~4HK~P) attack startup reduced 15 → 14; active frames 4 → 5; Block Advantage -12 → -13; KD Advantage +32 → +31 Cancels from the backstep 1f earlier; combined with faster startup, it now frame traps 4-frame buttons after blocked 6HK DL4 Freeflow Strikes 2nd hit (236P/PP~6P) added an extended combo-only hitbox and adjusted pushback to ensure the combo does not drop after the initial hit connects OD Bakkai (236KK) startup reduced 21 → 18; 1st hit active frames increased 3 → 6; recovery decreased 62 → 59 Block Advantage -46 → -43; final hit launches opponent higher, KD Advantage +12 → +23; Hitconfirm window 74 → 77 JP Forward Throw distance from opponent increased in the corner; KD Advantage reduced +24 → +23 Corner throw loop is now much weaker; still +1 after dashing or can use Drive Rush 2MP extended hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery 5HK Drive Damage on Block reduced 6000 → 4000 Guillotinna (6MK) increased pushback on block Zilant (5HK~HP) Drive Damage on Block reduced 2500 → 2000 Combined with the 5HK change, this TC drains 0.25 Drive bars less than before MK/HK/OD Torbalan (236MK/HK/KK) extended the vertical detection range for the projectile to transition into its attack to prevent whiffing in juggles Departure: Shadow (214P/PP~214HP) can now be canceled into from 2LK / 5MP / 2MK / 5HK Hitconfirm windows: 5MP 15f / 2MK 15f / 5HK 18f; no combo from 2LK The portal can be slightly farther off-screen while allowing the spike projectile to be activated Juri Kyosesho (6MP) now knocks down when juggled into on airborne opponents (no difference when not mid-combo) Juggle Increase value 1 → 2 on juggled version; can still only connect in free juggle states (e.g. after 214KK) Senkai Kick (6MK) increased pushback on block Renko Kicks (6HP) whiff recovery increased 20 → 23; extended foot hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery Applies to regular and FSE version LP Tensenrin (623LP) 1st hit has a shorter upward launch; 2nd hit has a higher upward launch on airborne opponents Added larger combo-only hitbox on 2nd hit; increased 2nd hit SA3 cancel window by 4 frames; total Hitconfirm window 17 → 21 These changes make it easier to juggle into both hits of 623LP and relaxes the execution requirement for canceling into SA3 OD Fuhajin (214KK) Juggle Start value 2 → 0 (free juggle state); reduced horizontal knockback; added 2-hit combo scaling Allows more combo freedom, notably juggling into 6MP which also continues the juggle Ankensatsu (236MK / 236LKHK) blockstun 13 → 15; Block Advantage -10 → -8; reduced forward recovery hurtbox on hit/block Hitbox expands forward gradually to make it easier to connect on late active frames; max range 2.23 → 2.35 Regular 236MK only: proximity guard box starts much earlier, 17f → 5f; increased pushback on block; active frames 2-4 result in a knockdown (KD +24~26) 1-Stock 236MK only: causes limited juggle OTG bounce on airborne opponents (mostly useful for canceling to SA3 in juggle routes) Go Ohsatsu (236HK / 236MKHK) expanded the collision box upward to make it less likely to whiff under opponents in juggles Applies to all boosted or non-boosted versions SA3 combo-only hitbox expanded upward Assist Combo 2 (Modern Controls) updated to: 2MP > 214KK, 6MP > SA1 (with Drive meter and at least 1 Super gauge) 2MP > 214KK, 6MP > 623HP (with Drive meter and no Super gauge) Ken 5MK can now be canceled into Supers; Super Hitconfirm Window 15f; removed 20% Starter scaling 2HP blockstun increased 18 → 21; Block Advantage -10 → -7 DRC Block Advantage +8 → +11; Run~Stop Block Advantage -10 → -7; Drive Damage on Block increased 5000 → 6000 2HP > HK Jinrai is now only a 5 frame gap on block and is DI-safe Run~Shoryuken (KK~623P) 1st hit Juggle Start / Juggle Increase values 1 → 0; 2nd hit Juggle Start 1 → 2 and Juggle Increase 1 → 2 Makes it less likely for the 2nd hit to whiff in a juggle when the 1st hit connects Kazekama Shin Kick (236K~6LK) damage increased 500 → 600; Counter-hit/Punish Counter KD Advantage increased +28 → +32 and now causes a Hard Knockdown OD Senka Snap Kick (236KK~6HK) active frames increased 4 → 6; recovery reduced 20 → 18 (no change to total duration) More consistent in juggles when the opponent is launched high from the initial 236KK SA2 now benefits from +20% Counter-hit/Punish Counter damage boost, 2800 → 3360; much stronger as a raw punish Kimberly Windmill Kick (4HK) increased pushback on block Hidden Variable / Teleport (214P): normals used after reappearing now gain +3 Juggle Limit and cause an air knockdown Gives extended juggles similar to Drive Rush without meter cost, and can give stronger Forced Knockdown punishes Does not apply to 2HK or Command Normals Lily 5HP startup reduced 11 → 10; head hurtbox invincibility shifted back 1 frame to match (10-35 → 9-34) Allows a much more consistent combo from PC 5LP where other moves would whiff or reach the opponent on late active frames Ridge Thrust (3HP) increased pushback on block OD Condor Spire (236KK, Regular/Windclad) now has two possible travel distances depending on the button combination Far: MK+HK / Modern: A[3S] Short: LK+MK or LK+HK / Modern: A[1S] or A[2S] Can be more easily spaced on later active frames for improved advantage or to remain safe from Drive Reversal The new Short Windclad version has 8f less KD Advantage compared to the original Far version Regular version: recovery reduced 16 → 13; blockstun 21 → 18 (Block Advantage unaffected); KD Advantage +42(54) → +43(55); Perfect Parry Advantage -27(-15) → -24(-12) Windclad Condor Dive (W.j.PP/PPP) can now spend a Windclad stock to perform a follow-up Condor Dive on the hit/block rebound Can only be performed once per jump; useful to extend combo damage, or punish the opponent trying to dash or Drive Rush to punish the initial Dive The OD version only costs 1 additional Drive bar regardless of which Condor Dive starter was used; grants a Hard Knockdown on hit for great oki anywhere on screen Luke 5HP recovery on block reduced 23 → 22; Block Advantage -6 → -5; Perfect Parry Advantage -24 → -23 Does not affect blockstring gaps when canceled into specials/DR Rawhide (6MP) increased pushback on block Double Impact (6HP~HP) 2nd hit results in a staggered tailspin (Forces Stand) when the 1st hit connects as a Punish Counter Advantage on Punish Counter: +2 (+37 on the cancel frame, allowing a cancel into any fully charged Flash Knuckle); also +28 after DR Cancel Punish Counter version does not incur the usual 2-hit damage scaling when comboed into LP Flash Knuckle (214LP) recovery reduced 31 → 27; KD Advantage increased +32 → +36; blockstun increased 16 → 18; Block Advantage -18 → -12; Perfect Parry Advantage -32 → -28 Reduced horizontal knockback on grounded opponents; the final 2 recovery frames on Hit are special/Super cancelable (allows corner juggle into 623LP or SA2) Reduced knockdown advantage on airborne opponents (to prevent unintended combo routes alongside the other changes) Held HP Flash Knuckle (214[HP]) decreased pushback on block for both regular/perfect versions On close range hit, Luke is in range for 2LK~2LP confirm or a 1-frame microwalk throw (longer microwalk if the opponent walks back) M. Bison Psycho Hammer (6HP) increased pushback on block Psycho Mine Backfist Combo (214P) meterless versions blockstun increased by 3f on all versions; Block Advantage +6 → +9 Psycho Mine MP Backfist Combo (214MP) launches the opponent higher (KD +42 → KD +44); can now juggle into 2HK / SA1 / SA3 anywhere on-screen Devil Reverse ([2]8K~P) forward movement speed reduced when activated in front of the opponent SA2 startup reduced 26 → 24; full invincibility reduced 1-32 → 1-30; expanded combo-only hitbox upward Holding back causes shorter horizontal movement, allowing M. Bison to remain on the same side or hit close range opponents more consistently Can now combo from 4HK on the ground Mai Senkotsu Uchi (6MP) increased pushback on block Falling Kachousen Fan (after 236PP / F.236PP / 236[P] / F.236[P]) hitstun reduced 30 → 25 and blockstun reduced 26 → 21 Less time to land combos/mixups/pressure when the bouncing fan connects Does not affect the falling fans after F.236[PP] or Midare Kachousen Held Kachousen (236[P]) recovery increased 30 → 32 and total 62 → 64; 1st hit blockstun reduced 30 → 28 1st Hit Block Advantage -1 → -5; Hit Advantage +1 → -1; Perfect Parry Advantage -20 → -22 Can now punish Mai before the bouncing fan connects if used at close range; especially important in corner setups where point blank 236[P] is throw punishable At ranges where only a 5-frame normal punishes, canceling into a forward-moving special can avoid the falling fan (character-specific) The blockstun change also increases the blockstring gap between the 1st fan and bouncing fan; normal-size characters can Throw to punish a close range 236[LP], but tall characters (Dee Jay, JP, Marisa, Sagat, Zangief) will still get Counter-hit by the bouncing fan; they can instead input a crouching Medium/Heavy normal so that Mai is in hitstun/blockstun while the bouncing fan connects, preventing her from getting a combo and pushing her away OD Kachouesen (236PP) 1st hit blockstun reduced 28 → 26; Block Advantage (1st hit) -3 → -5 Can now punish Mai before the bouncing fan connects if used at close range; especially important in corner setups where point blank 236PP is throw punishable At ranges where only a 5-frame normal punishes, canceling into a forward-moving special can avoid the falling fan (character-specific) LP Ryuuenbu (214LP, Normal/Flame) expanded hitbox / projectile clash box / proximity guard box forward; now causes Low Crush 7-14f; extends a forward hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery Drive Damage on Block increased 2000 → 4000; Drive Damage on Punish Counter increased 2500 → 6000 Makes it a much stronger midrange poking tool overall to compensate for Kachousen nerfs HP Ryuuenbu (214HP, Normal/Flame) 2nd hit launches airborne opponents higher for better juggle follow-ups (e.g. PC 5HK, Dash + 2LP > 214HP, 236LK, corner 623MK) Flame Version: startup reduced 15 → 14 and first hit active frames increased 3 → 4 to allow combo from 5LP (no change to total duration); 1st active frame only connects on grounded opponents Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (236K) slightly reduced forward movement on hit/block (less corner carry) Musasabi no Mai (j.214P/PP, Normal/Flame) expanded the combo-only hitbox forward on the 7th active frame onward for juggle consistency Manon 2LK projectile invincibility added to the hurtbox near Manon's head 5HP Juggle Limit increased 0 → 1; now works in more juggle routes into 5HP~HP or SA2 e.g. air-to-air j.MP, midscreen 236P~K, corner 236KK, corner 236PP~K > 4HP 5HK proximity guard box starts much later (2f → 12f), allowing opponents to walk back out of range more easily En Haut (4MK~MK) now maintains the Counter-hit/Punish Counter property of the initial 4MK (deals Drive damage for both Punish Counter hits) Can now combo the full TC into 236LP on Counter-hit and 214KK on Punish Counter Drive Rush bonus advantage does not carry though both hits Temps Lié (5HP~HP) active frames increased 2 → 5 (easier to connect in juggles alongside the 5HP change) LK Rond-point (236LK) no longer pushes back on a cornered hit vs. airborne opponents LK Dégagé (214LK) expanded 2nd hit combo-only hitbox for juggle consistency HK Dégagé (214HK) reduced pushback on hit for more consistent Counter-hit/Punish Counter links Marisa 2MK hitstun increased 24 → 25; hit recovery decreased 18 → 17; Hit Advantage +3 → +5 Can now combo out of Drive Rush into 4HP or 5MP~MP (close) / 2MP (mid) / 6MP (far) The mid-range link to 2MP has inconsistent spacing for cancels; 236LK / 236PP / Supers are the best ender 5HK/5[HK] expanded the forward hurtbox during recovery (easier to whiff punish) Novacula 1 (6MP) startup decreased 10 → 9; total animation 31 → 30 Now links after DR~2MK from much farther away than Marisa's other link options Malleus Breaker 1 (3HP) increased pushback on block As a result, Malleus Breaker 2 (3HP~3HP) whiffs when the first hit is not charged (likely unintentional) LP Dimachaerus (214LP) added a combo-only hitbox to the 1st active frame for combo consistency (can still whiff from long range cancels) Phalanx (623P) blockstun increased 23 → 24; Block Advantage increased +2(+3) → +3(+4); 623HP pushback on block reduced After blocked MP/HP versions, this improves: Frame traps with 5LP~LP Pressure with 5MP~MP (no longer causes air reset if opponent jumps) Trade combos vs. 4f normals; use 5MP after stand block or 4HP after crouch block for trade setup OD Phalanx (623PP) armor box expanded downward; armor time increased 6-12 → 6-17; pushback on block reduced Marisa is in command throw range (214K/KK~LPLK) against stationary opponents, but cannot convert after 2LK/2MK to threaten a back walk Rashid 5HK Juggle Start value on Punish Counter reduced 5 → 3; can now juggle into moves like 6MP or 214LK Beak Assault (6HP) increased pushback on block MP Spinning Mixer (236MP) Anti-Air Invincibility increased 6-10 → 6-14 (end of 2nd hit's active frames) OD Whirlwind Shot (236KK) reduced horizontal blowback distance when hitting a grounded opponent Easier to juggle afterward midscreen (can even pick up DR extensions) Held OD Whirlwind Shot (236[KK]) startup reduced 41 → 38; total animation 76 → 73 Can now be canceled into Arabian Cyclone follow-ups: Wing Stroke (4K) / Rolling Assault (6K) on frame 55 (can buffer the input as early as frame 37) Roll cancel is -4 oB at point blank, massively + oB from farther; also useful to avoid being punished by a jump-in 3rd hit launches higher when connecting on airborne opponents (easier to juggle follow-ups if opponent lands into the projectile) Ryu 5MP whiff recovery increased 11 → 13; extended arm/body hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery 2HP 1st active frame extends a combo-only hitbox to have the same range as 2nd active frame (ensures it will be cancelable in grounded combos) Collarbone Breaker (6MP) 2nd hit blockstun 21 → 19; Block Advantage -1 → -3 Solar Plexus Strike (6HP) proximity guard box starts much later (3f → 17f), allowing opponents to walk back out of range more easily High Double Strike (5HP~HK) launches the opponent higher (KD +36 → KD +39); can juggle into MP/OD Shoryuken in the corner Denjin Charge cancel KD +7 → KD +10 If the HK hits as a Punish Counter (e.g. after Luke's 236KK absorbs the 5HP), Ryu is still KD +37 (very rare scenario) LP Hashogeki (214LP) Drive Damage on Block reduced 4000 → 2000; increased pushback on block vs. Burnout OD Shoryuken (623PP) 1st active frame extends a combo-only hitbox for combo consistency Sagat 5LK reduced pushback on hit for combo consistency 2MP whiff recovery increased 17 → 19 Tiger Heavy Elbow (6MP) blockstun 20 → 19; Block Advantage -2 → -3; increased pushback on block Terry 2MP whiff recovery increased 14 → 15 Hammer Punch (6HP) blockstun → ; Block Advantage -2 → -3; increased pushback on block LK Crack Shoot (214LK) increased pushback on block vs. Burnout (weaker looping pressure) HP Round Wave (236HP) decreased pushback on hit OD Power Charge (236KK) can now cancel into other special moves on hit similar to the HK version Especially useful in the corner where 214HK can stop opponent from bouncing over his head SA1 now causes both players to become fully invincible immediately on contact to prevent unintended projectile interactions SA3/CA startup decreased 3 → 2 when canceled from Rising Tackle, Quick Burn, or Burning Knuckle Zangief Smetana Dropkick (3HK) lower body hurtbox reduced during from frame 5 onward (stronger Low Crush) OD Double Lariat (PPP) 4th hit expanded downward with increased pushback on block vs. Burnout; 2nd hit blockstun reduced 17 → 14 with reduced pushback on block This allows 3 hits to connect vs. Burnout crouch block for better chip damage, and it can be spaced safely against most punishes due to pushback Does not form a true blockstring between the last 2 hits if the opponent crouch blocks outside of Burnout
